title: Bramble Hill International School
description: BUSINESS NEWS - We are thrilled to announce...
bodyText:
Sponsored Content

BUSINESS NEWS - We are thrilled to announce that Bramble Hill International School has been nominated in the 2025 Best of George Readers’ Choice Awards across three categories:

- Best Private School
- Best Primary School
- Best High School


> These nominations, made by the George community and loyal readers of George Herald, are a true honour - and a reflection of the trust families place in our school.


At Bramble Hill, we provide the Cambridge International Curriculum from Grade R to Grade 12 on a safe, picturesque campus in the heart of George. As a small and nurturing school, we embrace a value-driven approach built around deep roots, strong branches and endless growth - helping each child thrive in a space where they are seen, supported and challenged

Our offering goes beyond academics. We’re proud to host a high-performance junior golf academy on campus (with limited spaces), and also provide a variety of co-curricular activities for our students including:

- Soccer, volleyball, chess, casual golf skills (for our younger learners)
- Drama club, public speaking, art club
- Cultural & environmental clubs, including the Interact Club, in partnership with Rotary.

We believe education is about building character, curiosity and compassion. Thank you to everyone who has recognised this and nominated Bramble Hill in this year’s awards.

Voting opened on 26 June at https://www.bestofsouthafrica.co.za/george/best-of-george-vote/ - we would love your support!

Visit our website at https://bramblehillinternationalschool.co.za/

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
